Singer and swimming star Cody Simpson has been credited with having a huge impact on the life of his girlfriend and fellow swimmer Emma McKeon.

Ahead of the Paris Olympics in July, McKeon reflected on how she has changed from the Tokyo Olympics in 2020, crediting Simpson, 27, and her family.

“The things that make me really happy are my relationship and my family,” the 29-year-old told Stellar.

“Swimming is not forever, so you have to be happy outside of that. And I am now.”

She also spoke about being named 2024’s Young Australian of the Year and other roles, including being named a UNICEF ambassador.

“Ever since I was little, I’ve had these huge goals of wanting to be the best and wanting to win an Olympic gold medal, and it feels really good to have achieved my dream,” she said.

“But it also makes me realise life is so big, as well, and there are all these other things I can do that feel really fulfilling.

“The satisfaction of winning is really great but it also ends quite quickly. Especially in sport.

“It’s like, ‘What’s next?’ So being able to do things like UNICEF, and whatever comes next … those things are more lasting.”

McKeon and Simpson began dating while training for the Commonwealth Games in 2022.

The couple gained lots of attention since sharing their relationship with the world, particularly because McKeon used to date fellow teammate Kyle Chalmers.

Earlier this year, McKeon spoke of her love for her younger boyfriend in a sweet birthday tribute.

“Happy birthday @codysimpson,” she wrote.

“Always making me smile, always making me laugh.

“Swipe for Cody bts (behind the scenes).”

Simpson, who has also acted, has released four solo studio albums since his debut as a recording artist in 2010.

McKeon won four golds at the 2020 Tokyo Olympics, held in 2021, and seven medals in total — the most by any female swimmer at a single Olympic Games.

title: Emma McKeon ‘happy’ to be in relationship with Cody Simpson as Paris Olympics approaches | PerthNow
description: Singer and swimming star Cody Simpson has been credited with having a huge impact on the life of his girlfriend and fellow swimmer Emma McKeon.
